programme.title: Adriana embarazada
programme.desc: Nelson dice a Guzmán q apoyara a el con Nikki. Aníbal hace q cancelen la producción de AV. Adriana no le dice a Carlos q esperan bebe. Roy renuncia porq Liliana le dice q ama a Guzmán. Victoria regresa y le da una gran noticia a Arriaga.

programme.title: De Balvanera a González
programme.desc: Aníbal le regala el vivero y tarjetas de crédito a Liliana. Victoria visita a Nelson. Ya están divorciados. Beatriz organiza una fiesta para Paula. Adriana y Victoria felices de esperar bebés.

programme.title: Fiesta de Paula
programme.desc: Polita escucha q Victoria y Arriaga esperan bebe y espera a Liliana para contarle. Festejan a Paula pero lamentablemente ella no resiste. Aníbal y candelaria se casaron. Adriana y Beatriz viven en el condo de Victoria.

programme.title: Al borde de la muerte
programme.desc: Liliana insulta a su padre. Santino regresa de Brasil. Santino, Arriaga y Guzmán crean una agencia de seguridad. Espanto ataca a Liliana. Vicente la está operando. Adriana comienza su parto.

programme.title: Reencuentro de amor
programme.desc: Vicente y Adriana se encuentran y se cuentan las fechorías de Aníbal. Nelson pide perdón a Guzmán. Adriana le reclama a Aníbal. Nikki le avisa a Roy sobre Lili. Carlos regresa y Adriana le miente.

programme.title: Verdadera hija
programme.desc: Liliana despierta y quiere casarse con Guzmán. Kendra trata de seducir a Aníbal. Candelaria le dice a Adriana toda la verdad.

programme.title: Sueño por cumplir
programme.desc: Salcero sospecha quienes atacaron a Lili. Espanto no delata a Kendra. Ella tiene planes siniestros. Carlos le reclama a Adriana. Vicente ofrece casarse con Adriana y ser el padre. Adriana le cuenta las buenas noticias a Vicente.

programme.title: Dos padres
programme.desc: Lili es operada nuevamente por hemorragia interna. Carlos quiere estar con Adriana pero ella lo rechaza. Vicente besa a Lili y Arriaga lo ve.

programme.title: Boda gay
programme.desc: Lily mejora y le pide perdón a Arriaga y a Victoria. Stefano y Jean Marie se van a casar y Odette apoya a su hijo. Lily le desea felicidad a Guzmán y Nikki y terminan amigos. Aníbal hace negocios cochinos.

programme.title: Dolor de padre
programme.desc: Día de boda de candelaria y Aníbal. Nelson no invitado llega con un regalo de bodas. Todas las verdades salen. Salcero quiere confesar sus delitos. Arriaga sale de la iglesia y sufre un shock.

programme.desc: Albertano le pide tiempo a María para pensar en el futuro de su relación y ella va con un brujo para pedirle ayuda. Doña Lucha intenta hablar con el chino sobre sexualidad, por lo que van a la fonda de Don Carmelo, donde ella termina ebria.

programme.title: Buenos padres
programme.desc: Gracias a Ludovico, los padres de un compañero de Ludoviquito hacen una visita a su casa para conocerlos, por lo que los P.Luche deben actuar más decentemente para impresionarlos.

programme.title: Reality show
programme.desc: Un productor descubre a los P. Luche (incluyendo Excelsa) y los invita a participar en un programa similar a Big Brother, el cual se realizaría en la propia casa de la familia con muchas cámaras vigilándolos, y el ganador recibirá un millón de pesos.

programme.title: Hoy por mí, mañana por ti
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Corregido y aumentado
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Primer amor, Benito a mil por hora
programme.desc: Benito is having problems with math and the Rivers ask Silvia to help him. Silvia later finds an S written on Benito's notebook and thinks he's in love with her.

programme.title: Batidora, computadora y secadora
programme.desc: Silvia asks Magdalena for her old blender, Magdalena asks Luis for his old dryer, and Frankie asks Silvia for a computer.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: A bailar con la más fea
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.desc: Pedro ha extraviado a Rambo y se deprime. La suegra de Alejandra quiere llevar a los López Pérez de vacaciones.

programme.title: Mollejitas 'Mi flaquita'
programme.desc: Arturo tiene la idea de poner un puesto callejero de comida. Pedro y Cris aplican técnicas de feng shui en el departamento para las buenas energías.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La ex de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko tiene contacto con una exnovia y Alejandra se pone celosa. Los Rivers llevan a Luisito Jr. a algunos cástines.

programme.title: Tomasa
programme.desc: Luis compra un dispositivo inteligente para controlar el departamento y lo presume con los Vecinos. Los López Pérez rifan un extraño cuadro.

programme.title: La cruda
programme.desc: Rocko y Alejandra bebieron demasiado la noche anterior y no recuerdan nada de lo que pasó, Rocko fue arrestado por el robo de artículos para bebes y Luisito Jr. dio sus primeros pasos impresionando a sus padres de la nueva etapa que comienza.

programme.title: Prueba de embarazo
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que está embarazada, ¿cómo lo tomará la familia? Chris y su pareja han decidido adoptar a un bebé.

programme.title: Melena de Luis
programme.desc: Luis debe recurrir a remedios extremos para poder continuar con su labor de venta. Rocco está dispuesto a fugarse de la prisión.

programme.title: Foto familiar
programme.desc: El abuelo de Benito llega al edificio para tomarse la foto familiar. Germán encuentra a un equipo de niños con quien hacer la reta de fútbol.

programme.title: Abarrotes Don Arturo
programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Bus Stop Bandits
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.desc: Curly is mentioned in a will.

programme.title: Pals and Gals
programme.desc: Cowboy Stooges rescue dance-hall girls.

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: The Vulgar Ring Story
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Who's Lisa
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville�and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Music To Milk By
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: The Man For The Job
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Eb Elopes
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Jealousy, English Style
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever, with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Haney's New Image
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Morticia, The Decorator
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: Addams Cum Laude
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: Cat Addams
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can affect cures.

programme.title: Lurch's Little Helper
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: Ophelia's Career
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family Goes To School
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Morticia And The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: Fester's Punctured Romance
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: Gomez, The Politician
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wolf's Bane
programme.desc: Clues, including a prior encounter with Derek (Tyler Hoechlin), bring Jackson (Colton Haynes) to a dangerous revelation about Scott (Tyler Posey)…and his actions begin to threaten not only Scott's life, but his own as well.

programme.title: Co-Captain
programme.desc: With startling revelations weighing in on him, Scott (Tyler Posey) finds himself scrambling to protect the people he loves, including Allison (Crystal Reed) who begins to follow clues left by her Aunt Kate about her family history.

programme.title: Formality
programme.desc: While struggling with family secrets, Allison (Crystal Reed) focuses on the Winter Formal dance. Meanwhile, as the tensions between werewolves and hunters rise to a boiling point, Scott (Tyler Posey) struggles to protect both friends and enemies.

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In the season finale, Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) discovers one last clue which allows him to enlist both friends -- and even a previous enemy -- in order to stop the mysterious killings and win back Allison (Crystal Reed), the girl he loves.

programme.title: Omega
programme.desc: When Lydia (Holland Roden) goes missing from the hospital, werewolves and hunters alike begin a search to discover not only where she is, but what she may have become. Meanwhile Jackson's (Colton Haynes) body seems to be fighting against the bite.

programme.title: Shape Shifted
programme.desc: The night before a full moon, Isaac's father (John Wesley Shipp) is murdered. When Isaac (Daniel Sharman) is arrested, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) resolve to break him out before the Argents get to him.

programme.title: Ice Pick
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to stop Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) from creating new werewolves, while Chris Argent (JR Bourne) decides to officially begin Allison's (Crystal Reed) training. Meanwhile, the new creature in Beacon Hills takes another victim.

programme.title: Abomination
programme.desc: When the shapeshifter strikes again, Scott (Tyler Posey) has to recruit a reluctant Allison (Crystal Reed) to acquire a rare book from Gerard's (guest star Michael Hogan) collection, while also once again surviving dinner with the Argents.

programme.title: Venomous
programme.desc: Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) becomes convinced that Lydia (Holland Roden) is the shapeshifter they're after since she seemed immune to its toxin, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) to gather his friends -- and even some enemies -- to protect her.

programme.title: Descent
programme.desc: A meek anthropologist (Leland Orser) develops a serum for genetic dominance and tests it on himself. Now his newfound confidence takes complete control of him, turning him into an irrational, overly aggressive troglodyte! Can he reverse the process?

programme.title: The Haven
programme.desc: The Haven is a high-tech apartment building which is run by supercomputer and almost completely eliminates the need for human contact. But when things begin to go wrong, neighbors who have never met must learn to work together in order to survive!

programme.title: Deja Vu
programme.desc: When a scientist's (Kevin Nealon) experiment unintentionally creates a rift in the space-time continuum, he suddenly find himself caught in a time loop and soon begins to suspects sabotage. Terri Hawkes, Jennifer Copping and Ronny Cox also star.

programme.title: Stranded
programme.desc: A boy (Adam Hann-Byrd) , picked on by high-school bullies and neglected by his own father (Daniel Hugh Kelley), finds comfort in an alien (Chris Potter) who has crash-landed on earth. But is the alien what he claims to be? Never…in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Starcrossed
programme.desc: In a world dominated by alien invaders, a cynical American cafe owner (Nathan Fillion) must decide if he will risk his life to help an old lover fight for Earth or if he is happy not rocking the political boat. Derek de Lint also stars.

programme.title: Better Luck Next Time
programme.desc: When Detective Terry Russo (Megan Gallagher) is called to investigate a double murder, she discovers she may be solving not one crime, but possibly hundreds. And that the culprit -- or culprits -- may not be human at all. Michael Riley also stars.

programme.title: Judgment Day
programme.desc: A convicted murderer is turned loose only to be hunted by the sister of his victim as part the hottest show on television, Judgment Day, which allows the family members -- and the at home audience -- to act as judge, jury and executioner!

programme.title: The Gun

programme.title: Why Is Everyone So Emotionally Fragile?
programme.desc: Emotional maturity is a difficult thing to truly come by. Making your needs known, setting boundaries, being able to disappoint people without being afraid. If it's such an important skill, why is it so hard to discover how to develop it? Expect to learn how Whitney has been changed since becoming a mother, why Whitney has been thinking about circumcision so much, what codependence is and how to overcome it, why your niceness might be narcissism in disguise, why the news and memes are moving at such an insane velocity right now and much more...

programme.title: The Biology Of Focus, Success & Long-Term Energy
programme.desc: From personal dramas to scientific uproars, it's been a wild year for the biggest health & fitness podcaster in the world. And today we get to discover his biggest new insights about life, relationships and protocols. Expect to learn whether you actually should drink coffee within 90 minutes of waking up, how to get the best sleep of your life according to the latest science, how to become a morning person, what Andrew has learned about the perils of fame and public scrutiny, what new research says on the world of longevity supplements, why you should always do your research when testing with peptides and much more…

programme.title: The Lost Art of Reinventing Yourself
programme.desc: Expect to learn what “Don’t half-ass it” means, the story of how Matthew got his iconic starting role in Dazed & Confused, how to see the upside during any crisis, why having a sense of humour should be your default emotion, McConaughey’s own version of his Lonely Chapter, when you should listen to your gut versus your head, why McConaughey turned down $14.5M to pursue something great, Matthew's reflections on the 10 year anniversary of Interstellar, lesson on finding the perfect partner, and much more…
